title: Pixel Cat's End GUI
description: GUI redesigned in the style of Pixel Cat's End, colorpicked to the site color palette.
body:
#
![Pixel Cat's End Texture Pack ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0610e58fd491bb2bfafa9c165e2455904a6c2bd7.png)
##
GUI resource pack based on the virtual pet site [Pixel Cat's End](https://www.pixelcatsend.com/home). Currently in early stages, may have broken or missing textures! Feel free to report issues or suggestions on the [forum thread](https://www.pixelcatsend.com/forum&topic=14521)!

Updates currently paused as I focus on other projects, but will continue soon.
##
### Features Include
- Hotbar
- Survival GUI
- Health/Hunger/Armor Icons
- Xp bar
- Mob effect icons based on site NPCs/cats
- Appleskin support
##
Creative inventory and other GUI textures are **in progress!**
